details.description: Small vernacular beach hut set on the sand dunes of Costa da Caparica. The building is timber-framed and clad with vertically striped boards painted white with narrow contrasting stripes. It has a red terracotta gabled roof and a wraparound porch shaded by a simple cane/reed pergola on white posts. Plastic chairs and a picnic table sit on the porch; a surfboard used as a sign leans by the doorway. A blue neighboring hut with a round porthole-like window is visible to the right. In front is loose dune sand with a white sun lounger. A wooden utility pole and overhead power lines cross the scene. Behind the huts are low dunes with sparse vegetation under an overcast coastal sky. The architecture and setting match the traditional fishermen’s palheiros/barracas found along the Costa da Caparica dunes.

details.description: A moody coastal scene on the Costa da Caparica beach shows a small wooden beach hut with vertical white and red striped siding and a red-tiled pitched roof. It sits on sandy dunes with a covered veranda supported by white posts, and plastic chairs and a table on the shade area. A surfboard leans against the hut, suggesting a surfing/beach activity context. Behind it, a blue-painted building is visible, along with other beach structures. A wooden utility pole with cables crosses the cloudy sky, contributing to a rustic, seaside atmosphere. The sand is pale and textured with footprints, and distant dunes are just visible.

details.description: A small wooden beach hut stands directly on sandy dunes under an overcast sky. The hut has vertical striped cladding, a red tiled gable roof, and a wraparound pergola that shades a porch with plastic chairs and picnic tables. A surfboard leaning by the doorway appears to serve as a sign, and a person is at the entrance. A wooden utility pole with overhead power lines crosses the scene in the foreground. To the right is another low blue hut with a round porthole-style window. A white sun lounger rests on the sand in front; low dune vegetation is visible behind. The setting is a simple seaside hut on the Costa da Caparica beaches in Portugal.

details.description: A small wooden beach hut with vertical striped siding and a red-tiled gable roof sits on sandy dunes at a Portuguese beach. The hut has a shaded veranda with plastic chairs and a surfboard leaning against the wall. In the background, a bright blue building and driftwood-adorned structures are visible, along with a tall wooden utility pole and overhead cables. The sky is overcast, and the broad sandy expanse suggests a coastal scene likely in Costa da Caparica, Portugal. The overall mood is a windy, subdued beach setting with casual seaside furniture and northern European architectural detailing.

details.description: A view of a traditional wooden beach hut, characteristic of the 'Palheiros' found along the Costa da Caparica coastline, situated directly on the sand dunes under an overcast sky. The main building features vertical white wooden cladding with dark gaps and a red terracotta tiled gable roof. A rustic porch area is attached to the front, supported by a simple wooden frame with a reed or bamboo shade covering. Underneath the porch, a person is standing near the entrance, and a surfboard with 'SNICKERS' branding leans against the wall. Several plastic chairs and tables are arranged on the porch. In the foreground left, a weathered wooden utility pole stands with power lines stretching across the frame. To the right background, a neighboring beach hut painted blue with white trim and a grey roof is visible. A white plastic sun lounger sits on the sand in the foreground right.

details.description: A vertical shot of a traditional striped wooden beach hut, known as a 'palheiro', on the sandy dunes of Costa da Caparica. The primary hut is white with vertical dark brown stripes, featuring a red clay tile roof and a small porch area where a person is standing. A surfboard with 'SNICKERS' branding leans against the front wall. In the background, another hut painted bright blue is visible. The foreground consists of rippled sand, and a weathered wooden utility pole with a single wire cuts across the upper left of the frame. The sky is heavily overcast with grey clouds, creating soft, diffused lighting.

details.description: A small striped wooden beach hut sits directly on a sandy beach under an overcast sky. The building has vertical white-and-beige cladding, a red clay gabled tile roof, and a covered porch supported by white posts with outdoor tables and chairs. A person stands at the doorway. In front of the hut is a freestanding surfboard‑shaped advertising sign that appears to read "Sharks" or similar, hinting at a surf school or rental. Nearby is a wooden utility pole with an overhead cable crossing the scene. Behind the hut are dunes with sparse vegetation and additional small beach cabins, including a blue one with a round porthole-style window.

The overall mood is a windy, stormy coastal setting.

details.description: A low-angle photograph, oriented vertically, depicting a white wooden beach cottage (palheiro) situated directly on the sand under a dramatic, overcast grey sky. The main structure features white clapboard siding, a red tiled roof, and a covered veranda where a person in a blue shirt is standing. A promotional surfboard with 'SNICKERS' branding leans against the porch railing. Behind the white house, a blue wooden building with white trim and a balcony is visible. A weathered wooden utility pole stands prominently in the foreground with wires stretching across the sky. The setting is characterized by sandy terrain and rustic, vernacular architecture typical of a fishing village.

details.description: A row of traditional wooden beach houses, known as 'palheiros', situated directly on a sandy beach. The central structure is a white-painted wooden house with horizontal slats and a red-tiled gabled roof. A person is visible on its porch, and a surfboard with a 'Snickers' logo leans against the railing. To the right, another hut is painted a vibrant blue. A weathered wooden utility pole with power lines stretches across the foreground. The sky is filled with heavy, dark, overcast clouds, creating a moody atmosphere. The ground is composed of fine, rippled sand, and dunes are visible in the far background.
